[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001110110 5
1 011001000 3
2 111011100 6
3 111101101 7
4 101111111 8
5 001111111 7
6 110111111 8
7 001001101 4

45 54 001000100 2
56 65 001000000 1

70 07 111001100 5
